title: aconitum × setiferum
intro: Aconitum × setiferum, also known as monk's hood, is a hybrid plant species within the Aconitum genus, characterized by its tall spikes of purple flowers and highly toxic properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including pain relief and fever reduction, due to the presence of alkaloids such as aconitine. The health benefits of Aconitum × setiferum include its potential to treat conditions like rheumatism, arthritis, and even some forms of cancer, although its use is often cautioned against due to its toxicity. Herbal preparations of Aconitum × setiferum are typically made in small doses and under the guidance of a medical professional, often in the form of tinctures, decoctions, or infusions.
